metadata.description: Official plugin marketplace for OpenHarness-SQL — performance diagnosis, CPU flamegraphs, and database tooling

plugins.name: cpu-flamegraph
plugins.description: Capture and analyze CPU flamegraphs for any Linux/macOS host. Pure Perl + JS — works in stock Claude Code too.

plugins.name: perf-kp-sql
plugins.description: Kunpeng + MongoDB/MySQL/Redis joint perf diagnosis. SshExec collect + 411 baseline rules + sqlite RAG knowledge base + flamegraph integration.
